description_long: This vending machine is a tall, rectangular unit with a transparent front panel displaying a large quantity of gold-colored coins or tokens inside. The top section is capped with a red, slightly overhanging lid, while the base is solid black, providing a sturdy foundation. The front face features a prominent, colorful Colgate-branded sign with the phrase 'Alcancía de Felicidad' and playful graphics, suggesting a promotional or prize-dispensing function. The transparent section allows clear visibility of the contents, which are neatly stacked and fill most of the internal volume. The sides and back appear to be less detailed, focusing attention on the front display. There are no visible buttons, payment interfaces, or retrieval slots on the exterior.
description: A tall, rectangular vending machine with a transparent front filled with gold coins, topped with a red lid and featuring a colorful Colgate promotional sign.
description_view_0: Front view showing the transparent panel filled with gold coins and the prominent Colgate 'Alcancía de Felicidad' branding.
description_view_1: Side-angled view revealing the depth of the coin-filled compartment and the continuation of the red lid and black base.
description_view_2: Another front view, nearly identical to view 0, emphasizing the clear display of coins and branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side-angled view, similar to view 1, showing the coin-filled compartment and the Colgate branding from a slightly different angle.
attribute_display_panel: A large, colorful printed display panel is located on the upper front of the machine, featuring the Colgate logo and promotional graphics. It covers a significant portion of the transparent area.
attribute_branding_or_signage: A prominent Colgate-branded sign with the text 'Alcancía de Felicidad' and colorful graphics is centered on the front transparent panel.
